forgotPassword.subtitle: Forgot your password? No worries, we'll help you reset it.
forgotPassword.instruction: Enter the email address associated with your account and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: We've sent a password reset link to your email address. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.

hero.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
hero.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your learning goals. All plans include access to our AI tools and verified tutors.
hero.plansSubtitle: Get the best value with our subscription plans

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for beginners starting their English journey

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: Ideal for serious learners committed to fluency

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Tailored solutions for businesses and institutions

items.question: Can I switch plans anytime?
items.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.

items.question: Do you offer refunds?
items.answer: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on all subscription plans. If you're not satisfied, we'll refund your payment in full.

items.question: Are there any hidden fees?
items.answer: No hidden fees! The price you see is the price you pay. All features listed in your plan are included.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime. You'll retain access until the end of your current billing period.

cta.title: Start Your Journey Today
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of students improving their English every day
